translated: Herod, upon hearing of the birth of the one who was to be king, became greatly troubled, and he gathered all the chief priests and scribes of the people together, seeking to inquire where the Messiah was to be born. Herod secretly called the wise men, determined to discover from them the exact time the star appeared, so that he might send them to Bethlehem to search carefully for the child, intending to kill him.
